name: Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Butter or margarine (or canola oil, but it won't look like theirs)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, stir together the cream of celery soup, flour, butter or margarine (or canola oil), garlic salt, and seasonings with a wire whisk.
2. Add the frozen chipped spinach and diced onion to the saucepan.
3. Cook until the spinach is tender and well-drained.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 109 calories; 7.5 grams total fat; (4.1 grams saturated fat); 2 grams protein; 7.5 grams carbohydrates; 20.9 milligrams cholesterol; 547.8 milligrams sodium.
